items.title: Could Cristiano Jr. play with Ronaldo? It wouldn't be soccer's first father-son pairing
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has won a littany of trophies and personal honours, but he could yet break new ground by playing first-team football with his son, Cristiano Jr.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Eala sweeps past Pavlyuchenkova in Mutua Madrid Open first round
items.summary: Alex Eala is through to the second round of the Mutua Madrid Open after a straight sets win over Anastasia Pavlyuchenkova.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Yankees players reportedly request an alternate jersey, bucking team history
items.summary: The Bombers famously have only two uniforms: one home, one road
